Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Key Roles Participants 1 Accounts Payable Clerk Mary receives invoices checks PO logs invoice forwards to purchasing matches line items sends to manager schedules payment 2 Purchasing Officer Dan confirms goods services received verifies invoice details against PO quantities prices delivery charges contacts supplier or asks AP to hold 3 Department Manager Carlos final approval can reject or request hold investigation 4 Accounts Payable Supervisor Rita handles escalations exceptions coordinates resolution retrospective POs 5 Supplier Relationship Manager Karen helps resolve supplier issues missing PO pricing discrepancies 6 Supplier external sends invoices provides corrections missing info 7 Accounting System logs invoices sends automatic emails notifications

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Main Flow Happy Path 1 Invoice received usually by email Start event 2 AP Clerk checks for valid PO number Gateway Has PO No Send back to supplier requesting more details rework loop supplier provides info presumably re enters flow Yes Continue 3 Log invoice into accounting system 4 Forward to Purchasing Department to confirm goods services received 5 Purchasing verifies invoice details against PO quantities prices delivery charges Gateway Discrepancy Yes Contact supplier directly OR ask AP to hold invoice until corrected version arrives Also if PO missing purchasing tells AP to get info first No Send confirmation email back to AP 6 AP matches invoice line items against PO in system three way match Gateway Match Yes Continue No discrepancy incorrect pricing missing items Email purchasing to clarify Gateway Resolvable No Escalate to AP Supervisor Rita Yes back to flow 7 System sends automatic email to Department Manager requesting approval 8 Manager reviews invoice details PO confirmation Gateway Approve Yes Approve in system No suspicious big difference vs budget unexpected items Reject OR ask AP to hold and investigate rare once every couple months 9 AP schedules for payment adds to next payment cycle run 10 End

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Exceptions Variations Missing PO sent back to supplier Mary Karen may contact supplier to get PO or revised invoice Rita handles informal services retrospective PO or reject Discrepancy at purchasing stage contact supplier directly or hold until corrected invoice Discrepancy at matching stage email purchasing to clarify escalate to supervisor if unresolvable Supervisor exception handling contact suppliers coordinate departments retrospective PO for informal services or decide to reject then back to normal flow Manager rejection or hold investigate Karen involved for supplier resolution missing PO pricing discrepancy checks contract advises correct price

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Uncertainties Conflicts Order of steps Mary says she logs invoice forwards to purchasing to confirm receipt then after confirmation she matches line items against PO Dan says he checks invoice details against PO quantities prices delivery charges So there is some overlap purchasing does verification and AP does matching Slight ambiguity in who matches what Dan says his job is to check details line up with what was ordered Mary says she matches line items against PO after receiving confirmation So both a purchasing check and AP match occur

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Dan assumes Mary moves it to manager uncertainty notation Carlos believes it goes back to AP for payment cycle consistent with Marys account What happens after manager rejection not fully specified possibly invoice is rejected terminated or investigated

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ambiguities Conflicts 1 Overlap in verification duties Both Mary and Dan describe comparing invoice to PO Dan verifies details at confirmation stage Mary matches line items after confirmation Model both as separate tasks purchasing verification then AP match consistent with Marys more detailed account 2 Dan is uncertain about post confirmation flow I assume Carlos uncertain about post approval I believe but accounts converge so model as stated with note 3 Manager rejection outcome unspecified reject vs hold and investigate endpoint of rejection not described 4 Missing PO handling differs slightly Mary sends back to supplier Karen says she may ask supplier for PO or revised invoice Rita handles informal services with retrospective PO or rejection Model as escalation ladder 5 Whether the re match after clarification returns to T6 or proceeds minor 6 Whether hold from purchasing corrected invoice re enters at T4 verification or T2 logging unclear assume re verification at T4 since invoice already logged Could note
